text: When loading the sketch tab, the "Discuss" sidebar should just start scrolled to the bottom - no scrolling animation

proposedTasks.title: Disable scroll animation on Discuss sidebar initial load
proposedTasks.description: When the Sketch tab mounts and the Discuss sidebar renders, the chat message list should initialize with scrollTop at the bottom instantly (no smooth-scroll animation). Use `scrollTo({ top: el.scrollHeight, behavior: 'instant' })` or set `scrollTop` directly on mount. Smooth scrolling should still apply for new incoming messages after the initial render. Acceptance criteria: (1) On navigating to the Sketch tab, the Discuss sidebar appears with the most recent message visible and no visible scrolling motion. (2) Subsequent new messages still auto-scroll smoothly.

taskTitles: Disable scroll animation on Discuss sidebar initial load
